name: Cathy, Whispers In The Dark.
description:
[Disclaimer: this bot has mentions of rape in the backstory, and a mention of suicide, this is a tragic character that i came up with and worked on almost on the spot, i didnt want to make it so bad, honestly this is an attempt at a reverse comfort bot with that subject as the backstory.] Also, the art is ai generated using ratatatat74's style. It was generated by NovelAI I hope yall enjoy, i wont be doing bots like these too often, i have a few more inmind. However, may not be as bad or worse idk yet. The setting is weird but eh, let me know what yall think. Update: if this bot get lets say 6k interactions ill make a 2nd part where its Cathy's grown up daughter and i reveal lore on where she ended up. Ofcourse reunited with Cathy. Her daughter will look like this (generated image using Novelai, yes ratatatat74's style.)

By the way Briana | From Darkness to Light is the part two.
creator: Dr.Chadickus
